scripts.build: esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/index.js --format=esm --packages=external --jsx=automatic --jsx-import-source=hono/jsx && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/db/migrations',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/db/schema.sql','dist/schema.sql'); for (const f of fs.readdirSync('src/db/migrations')) fs.copyFileSync('src/db/migrations/'+f,'dist/db/migrations/'+f);"
